cookieDescription: To give you the best experience, we use <bold>cookies</bold> to understand how you interact with our site and to improve your journey. You can manage your preferences or accept all cookies.
cookieSettingsDescription: We value your privacy and want you to have full control over which cookies are activated while you explore our website. Review your settings below and adjust as needed.
cookieNecessaryDescription: Necessary for security and core site functionality
cookieAnalyticsDescription: Help us gather anonymous insights on how our site is used
feedbackHelpSubtitle: Your feedback will help us improve {brandName}. Don't hold back, please provide as much detail as possible
feedbackChangeSelection: Want to change? Go back and select the exact content you'd like to report
feedbackError: Something went wrong. Your feedback could not be submitted. Please try again.
feedbackThanks: Thanks for your feedback. This will help us serve you better.
newVersionDescription: A new version of the application is available. Please refresh the page to get the latest updates and improvements.
